en.extract:
The brown-winged starling (Aplonis grandis) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''brown-winged starling''' ('''''Aplonis grandis''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]]. It is found in the [[Solomon Islands archipelago]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
